name: mlflow
description: MLflow REST API proxy MCP server

tools.name: list_experiments
tools.description: List all MLflow experiments with artifact location and lifecycle stage

tools.name: get_experiment
tools.description: Get detailed experiment info including tags

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List runs for an experiment, sorted by metric, filterable by status

tools.name: get_run
tools.description: Get detailed run info: params, metrics, tags, artifact URIs

tools.name: get_metrics
tools.description: Get metric history for a run (full time series)

tools.name: get_params
tools.description: Get all parameters for a run

tools.name: list_artifacts
tools.description: List artifacts for a run (files and directories)

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List registered models with versions, stages, and description

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Verify MLflow API connectivity, version, and tracking URI
